slides.title: Welcome to Wild Guest List!
slides.text:
A wild party is about to begin!

Your goal is to get more of your animals into the party than your opponents.

Build the strongest guest list and become the winner!

slides.title: These Are Your Animals
slides.text:
Each player owns 12 unique animals.

You will only see a few cards in your hand at a time.

Every animal can only be played once during the entire game.

slides.title: Play An Animal
slides.text:
On your turn, choose one animal card.

The selected card is placed at the back of the queue.

A smart move can completely change the outcome of the game.

slides.title: Special Animal Powers
slides.text:
Every animal has its own unique ability.

Some animals move forward, some remove others, and some completely change the queue.

Learning their powers is the key to victory.

slides.title: When The Queue Fills Up
slides.text:
Whenever the queue reaches 5 animals, it is resolved.

The first 2 animals join the party.

The last animal is thrown into the trash.

The remaining animals stay in the queue.

slides.title: How To Win
slides.text:
The game ends when every player has used all 12 animals.

The player with the most animals in the party wins.

Good luck and have fun!
